 {"id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","title":"Task: Add Program Dashboard CLI Commands","description":"# Task: Add Program Dashboard CLI Commands

## Objective
CLI commands for creating programs, managing sessions, and viewing dashboards.

## Implementation Details

### Commands

#### `brenner program create`
```bash
brenner program create \
  --name="Cell Fate Determination" \
  --description="Investigating mechanisms of cell fate decisions" \
  --question="What determines whether a progenitor cell becomes..."

# Output:
✓ Created program: RP-20251230-cell-fate
  Name: Cell Fate Determination
  Status: active
  Sessions: 0

Use `brenner program add-session RP-20251230-cell-fate <session-id>` to add sessions.
```

#### `brenner program add-session`
```bash
brenner program add-session RP-20251230-cell-fate RS-20251230

# Output:
✓ Added session RS-20251230 to RP-20251230-cell-fate
  Sessions: RS-20251230
```

#### `brenner program list`
```bash
brenner program list [--status=active|paused|completed|abandoned]

# Output:
Research Programs
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ID                        | Name                  | Status | Sessions
--------------------------|------------------------|--------|----------
RP-20251230-cell-fate     | Cell Fate Determination | active | 4
RP-20251115-chromatin     | Chromatin Dynamics     | paused | 2
RP-20251001-development   | Early Development      | completed | 8
```

#### `brenner program dashboard <id>`
```bash
brenner program dashboard RP-20251230-cell-fate

# Output:
Research Program: Cell Fate Determination
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Status: active | Days Active: 5 | Last Activity: 2025-12-31

HYPOTHESIS FUNNEL
  Proposed:  12 →  Active: 5  →  Killed: 6 | Validated: 0 | Dormant: 1
  Kill Rate: 60%  ████████████░░░░░░░░

ACTIVE HYPOTHESES
  H-RS20251230-001: Cell fate is epigenetically determined [active]
  H-RS20251231-003: Third alternative: chromatin accessibility [active]
  H-RS20260101-001: Transcription factor gradient model [active]
  ... and 2 more

BLOCKED TESTS
  ⚠ T-RS20251230-002: Lineage tracing with Cre-lox [blocked, 3 days]
    Blocked by: Waiting for mouse breeding
  ⚠ T-RS20251231-001: Single-cell ATAC-seq [blocked, 1 day]
    Blocked by: Equipment maintenance

SESSION SCORES
  RS-20251230: 72 (C)  ███████░░░
  RS-20251231: 78 (C)  ███████░░░
  RS-20260101: 85 (B)  ████████░░
  RS-20260102: 81 (B)  ████████░░
  Average: 79 (C) | Trend: Improving ↑

HEALTH: healthy ✓
```

#### `brenner program export <id>`
```bash
brenner program export RP-20251230-cell-fate --format=md

# Outputs markdown file with full program summary
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Create programs with validation
- [ ] Add/remove sessions from programs
- [ ] List programs with filtering
- [ ] Dashboard shows all key metrics
- [ ] Health status displayed
- [ ] Export to markdown/JSON
- [ ] Clear visual formatting

## Dependencies
- Task: Define Research Program Schema
- Task: Implement Program Storage Layer
- Task: Compute Dashboard Metrics

## Effort Estimate
~350 lines of code, ~4 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:03.43542596-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T03:10:22.211571976-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T03:10:22.211571976-05:00","close_reason":"Dashboard CLI command and metrics computation implemented in 3a8834f","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-2qyl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.228280105-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-4buj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.545953689-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.579819769-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-r2c5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.610319353-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:42:24.6129391-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-p8tz","title":"Security: harden Object.fromEntries + localStorage reading positions","description":"Harden a couple of key/value map construction points against prototype pollution + corrupted localStorage payloads.

- brenner.ts: replace Object.fromEntries for expected_outcomes with a null-prototype map and forbidden-key guard.
- apps/web/src/stores/readingStore.ts: validate/sanitize loaded state and avoid Object.fromEntries producing a prototype-pollutable object.

Acceptance:
- No regression in tests/build.
- __proto__/constructor/prototype keys do not mutate Object.prototype.
- readingStore gracefully handles malformed localStorage payloads.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-05T00:39:57.967601394-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T00:49:04.996712212-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-05T00:49:04.996712212-05:00","close_reason":"Hardened readingStore localStorage parsing (sanitize + null-proto map) and used null-proto record for expected_outcomes map construction"}
-{"id":"brenner_bot-patd","title":"TASK: Storage Layer Concurrency Safety Across Adapters","description":"# Goal
Prevent lost updates / dropped writes in storage adapters under concurrent access.

# Scope
- Audit storage adapters for read-modify-write patterns
- Add in-process locking (or atomic-write strategy) where needed
- Add concurrency tests (Promise.all) per adapter

# Constraints
- Repo invariant: tests must NOT delete temp dirs
- Keep locks deadlock-free (define lock ordering)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-05T04:27:16.723877232-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T04:27:30.948709337-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-patd","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-399m","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-05T04:27:16.749103487-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"brenner_bot-pcl","title":"Docs: incorporate new verbatim transcript primitives","description":"Extract quote bank (keyed by §) from newly un-truncated transcripts and update metaprompt + distillation docs to reflect the new primitives.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T17:37:00.584021757-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T18:00:41.358262249-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T18:00:41.358262249-05:00","close_reason":"Completed"}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-ph4p","title":"Task: Interactive Component Tests (Forms, Search, Actions)","description":"# Goal
Add unit tests for all interactive components (forms, search, command palette).

# Components to Test (by complexity)

## 1. SpotlightSearch.tsx (28KB) - HIGHEST PRIORITY
Test search interface:
- Search input focus and keyboard navigation
- Query debouncing
- Result rendering with highlights
- Keyboard result selection (arrow keys, enter)
- Result grouping by category
- Empty state handling
- Loading state
- Error state
- Close on escape
- Close on outside click

## 2. SessionForm.tsx (15KB)
Test session creation form:
- Research question input validation
- Excerpt selection (multi-select)
- Form submission
- Validation error display
- Loading state during submission
- Success/error feedback
- Form reset functionality

## 3. command-palette.tsx (14KB)
Test command palette:
- Open/close with keyboard shortcut
- Command search/filter
- Command execution
- Recent commands
- Keyboard navigation
- Command categories

## 4. OperatorSelector.tsx (10KB)
Test Brenner operator selection:
- Operator list rendering
- Category filtering
- Search within operators
- Selection callback
- Operator description display
- Multi-select (if applicable)

## 5. SessionActions.tsx (8.7KB)
Test session control actions:
- Start session button
- Pause/resume functionality
- Cancel session
- Action confirmation dialogs
- Disabled states
- Loading states during actions

# Test Pattern
```typescript
// SpotlightSearch.test.tsx
import { render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/react';
import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event';
import { SpotlightSearch } from './SpotlightSearch';

describe('SpotlightSearch', () => {
  it('opens on Cmd+K and focuses input', async () => {
    const user = userEvent.setup();
    render(<SpotlightSearch />);
    
    await user.keyboard('{Meta>}k{/Meta}');
    
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.getByRole('searchbox')).toHaveFocus();
    });
  });
  
  it('shows results after typing with debounce', async () => {
    const user = userEvent.setup();
    render(<SpotlightSearch />);
    
    await user.keyboard('{Meta>}k{/Meta}');
    await user.type(screen.getByRole('searchbox'), 'brenner');
    
    // Wait for debounce
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.getAllByRole('option').length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    }, { timeout: 500 });
  });
  
  it('navigates results with arrow keys', async () => {
    const user = userEvent.setup();
    render(<SpotlightSearch />);
    
    await user.keyboard('{Meta>}k{/Meta}');
    await user.type(screen.getByRole('searchbox'), 'brenner');
    
    await waitFor(() => screen.getByRole('option'));
    
    await user.keyboard('{ArrowDown}');
    expect(screen.getAllByRole('option')[0]).toHaveAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
  });
});
```

# Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SpotlightSearch.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage
- [ ] SessionForm.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage
- [ ] command-palette.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage
- [ ] OperatorSelector.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage
- [ ] SessionActions.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage
- [ ] All keyboard interactions tested
- [ ] All validation states tested
- [ ] All loading/error states tested","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:51:29.98426984-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T01:56:22.563449753-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T01:56:22.563449753-05:00","close_reason":"Completed: Added 111 tests total (35 command-palette + 38 SessionForm + 38 OperatorSelector). Full suite: 1862 passing tests.","labels":["testing unit-tests components interactive"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ph4p","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-77t2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:56:20.503845434-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ph4p","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8dy3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:36:26.228540049-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
